HGSS.095.0014:
Congratulations on your winning
streak, challenger!\f
The Frontier Brain has sent word
that he is impressed with you.\f
He sees your skill, and he’d
like to challenge you to a battle!\f
Are you ready to battle the Tower
Tycoon?
HGSS.095.0015:
Hi!
My name’s Palmer.\f
I heard a lot about you.
You are [0103,0000,0000] from\r
New Bark Town, right?\f
You are much younger than I thought.
So, I’d like you to show me.\f
Show me the bond you’ve built with
your Pokémon.\f
Show me what you’ve learned
through battles with Trainers!\f
HGSS.095.0016:
Palmer: So, you’ve come this far!\f
As the Tower Tycoon, I’ll have to
give you my best effort.\f
That’s how the best Trainers show
respect to each other.\f
By battling all out as dedicated
students of Pokémon!\f
HGSS.095.0017:
Bravo!\f
I imagine many great Trainers will come
to challenge me as you have just done.\f
That’s something I look forward
to a great deal.\f
You will become even more skilled.
Keep battling Trainers from around\r
the world and keep growing greater\r
in stature!\f
HGSS.095.0018:
Bravo!
I feel inspired in my heart!\f
My young friend, the world and your
future hold infinite promise.\f
The spirits of people and Pokémon
call for each other in resonance.\f
The resulting bond is infinitely strong!
Go on, you can be all that you desire!\f
There is no limit to where you can go!\f
HGSS.095.0019:
You have cleared your seventh match!
Congratulations!\f
To pay tribute to your talent,
we present you BP!\f
HGSS.095.0020:
Congratulations!\f
Your victory over the Tower Tycoon
was an inspiration!\f
To pay tribute to your talent,
we present you BP!\f
HGSS.095.0022:
Saving...
Don’t turn off the power.
